name: fix_chapter9_screenshot_symptom
prompt: 使用 md-math-cleanup 检查并修复 普通物理/output/Chapter9_磁场_复习前概览梳理.md，让 Obsidian 里末尾公式不要显示成灰底代码、红色 LaTeX 命令，或 $ \vec E $ 这种普通文本。
expectations: Runs the bundled scanner before editing
Converts math-like inline code spans to $...$ while preserving PDF/date source markers
Replaces unsupported \oiint with an Obsidian-stable closed surface integral representation
Runs the scanner again and reports remaining issue count

name: fix_directory_of_physics_notes
prompt: 使用 md-math-cleanup 把 普通物理/output 里的 md 物理笔记都处理成 Obsidian 可读公式，重点处理反引号里的公式、\(...\)、\[...\]、$ \vec E $ 这种空格 inline math、\oiint 和双反斜杠。
expectations: Recurses the target directory for Markdown files
Uses --write --aggressive-code-spans when the user asks to fix the whole note set
Reports changed file count and issue categories
Does not rewrite source-file references such as PDF names or date markers

name: check_only_report
prompt: 只检查不改：告诉我这些 md 里还有哪些公式会在 Obsidian 中显示异常。
expectations: Leads with remaining file and line issues
Explains Obsidian-specific symptom categories in Chinese
